expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind shipment checkpoint covers prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close or save decision safety
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the required focus areas are explicitly listed under both the initial “explicit coverage of” section and the “Phase Alignment: phase5b” section: “prompt lifecycle”, “template flow”, “builder loading”, and “close-or-save decision safety.” It also explains these are expected gating areas for the shipment checkpoint.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled “Phase5b Shipment Checkpoint — RE-P5B-SHIP-GATE-001” and includes a dedicated section “Phase Alignment: phase5b (Shipment Checkpoint)” describing phase5b expectations and concluding a phase5b gate status (“BLOCKING — NOT VERIFIABLE WITH PROVIDED EVIDENCE”).
